asset.title: Startup Diligence War Room
asset.purpose: README live walkthrough clip. Judge whether the feature is obvious, visually consistent, and credible as evidence.

judge.summary: The walkthrough provides a clear, high-fidelity demonstration of the multi-agent war room, showcasing spreadsheet enrichment, public/private agent boundaries, and live trace logs.

featureClarity.evidence: The video clearly demonstrates key features including data enrichment, public/private agent switching, and real-time trace logging.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Shows the full sequence from pending enrichment to execution, trace updates, and subsequent private agent queries.

visualDesign.evidence: The dark-themed interface is highly polished, though the dense layout contains a large amount of simultaneous information.

consistency.evidence: Perfectly aligns with the NodeRoom paradigm of spreadsheets, notes, public/private agents, and execution traces.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Authentic UI capture showing real-time state changes, agent thinking states, and detailed log payloads.

legibility.evidence: Most text is readable, though small font sizes in the trace log and copilot panel may require zooming on smaller screens.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Directly addresses startup diligence and financial analysis use cases, highly relevant to target personas.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately depicts agent processing latency and explicitly displays the underlying trace payloads.

observedEvidence: Research tab showing company enrichment status
Copilot panel with public and private agent modes

defects.observed: The Room Trace log area is highly dense with text, making rapid scanning slightly difficult.
defects.fix: Consider adding slight vertical padding or subtle color-coding to separate distinct trace events.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Run concurrent, source-backed research and private analysis within a unified, multi-agent startup diligence war room.
